message:
feat(rch): enhanced CLI commands, status display, and TUI components

Comprehensive improvements to the Remote Compilation Helper, expanding
command functionality, improving status visualization, and enhancing
the terminal user interface for better user experience.

- Added new subcommands for advanced worker management
- Implemented batch operation support for multiple workers
- Added command aliasing for frequently used operations
- Improved argument validation with detailed error messages
- Added shell completion generation for bash/zsh/fish

- Enhanced worker status formatting with color-coded health indicators
- Added job progress visualization with progress bars
- Implemented resource utilization displays (CPU, memory, disk)
- Added network latency indicators for remote workers
- Improved table formatting for consistent alignment

- Expanded application state management for complex workflows
- Added modal dialog support for confirmations
- Implemented notification system for async events
- Added keyboard shortcut help overlay
- Improved focus management between panels

- Enhanced keyboard event processing with key chord support
- Added mouse event handling for clickable elements
- Implemented timer-based refresh for live data
- Added event debouncing for high-frequency inputs
- Improved resize event handling with layout recalculation

- Implemented state machine for TUI navigation
- Added history tracking for undo/back navigation
- Improved filter and sort state persistence
- Added state serialization for session restore

- Added new widget types: progress bars, gauges, sparklines
- Implemented scrollable list with virtual rendering
- Added table widget with sortable columns
- Implemented search/filter input widgets
- Added status bar widget with contextual actions

Also syncs beads issue tracker state after merge resolution.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
